what_it_does: A close-out narrative (2026-06-08) from the interface/lead session reporting that the parallel work streams (interface/studio, Claude Design prep, cognition merge) were converged into one stable main. It records the three merge commits, the state of the Claude Design prep docs, the new in-app Review (studio) surface, what is proven by use vs what is left for Tim to decide, and next moves.
observations: Reports main is stable: all-green gate holds — 117 suites, 113 green, 4 documented live-dep skips, 0 RED
Lists three verified merge commits: 81f48be (prep, docs-only 21 files), 8734c40 (studio Review surface scaffold, by-use 6/6), 6d27099 (fixed 2 studio-introduced suite reds correctly)

Inventories the build-prep/claude-design/ prep docs: BACKEND-SEAM-PACK (canonical backend contract), AUTHORING-FE-HANDOFF/AUTHORING-UI-BRIEF, APPLICATION-STRUCTURE-PACK (the keystone), README, research/
Describes the new in-app Review surface at canvas/app/src/regions/Review.tsx with three regions [Rail | Stage | RhmPanel(+Composer)], wired to real backend endpoints (/api/corpus, /api/annotate)
States the Review surface is deliberately UNSTYLED with neutral --studio-* token-slots — the structure to point Claude Design at
Verified by use at both widths 1440 and 390 on a temp store, never the live one
Lists Tim's-eyes items: a reversible ui_registry scoping call, deferred studio-extract worktree removal, the studio FORM, two harmless live-store leaves, five net-new studio binds
Notes other concurrent sessions (research-prep, leftover worktrees) as disjoint/harmless
standouts: The all-green gate figures (117 suites / 113 green / 4 skips / 0 RED) as the convergence proof
The retirement of the old detached standalone HTML mockup in favor of a real in-app Review surface wired to the real backend — the stated sin of the old standalone was reinventing

The five net-new studio binds left as the 'last 5%': R2 /api/context route, per-address tier data (I4), persistent server-side locus (R1), auto comment->build-intent promotion (L1), in-frame element deixis
conventions: Separates proven-by-use (green checks) from yours-to-decide (yellow) — the verification-before-completion discipline
Offers Tim explicit decision items rather than binary confirmation, with reversibility noted on the scoping call
Path-scoped, clean commits asserted; temp-store-not-live-store discipline for verification
concerns: Acknowledges two annotation/chat rows were written to the LIVE store by a scaffold agent before catching itself (append-only, non-code) — flagged harmless but a live-store leak nonetheless
notes: The convergence close-out: main is one stable green base, the Claude Design prep docs are one-source, and the unstyled in-app Review surface is the structure to design into — with five small binds and a few cleanup decisions left for Tim.
questions: Were the two harmless live-store leaves ever scrubbed, and was the studio-extract worktree removed?
Have the five net-new studio binds (R2 context route, I4 tier data, R1 locus, L1 promotion, element deixis) since been built?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — it presents itself as the convergence close-out of the merge-into-one-main mandate and the body delivers exactly that: the mandate-done claim, the commits, the prep/studio state, proof vs open items.
apparent_themes: Structure-first, style-later (the deliberately unstyled surface as a design target)
Reversible decisions surfaced for the operator
intention_signals: Trying to demonstrate that disparate parallel streams were genuinely unified into a single verified main with no green-paint, and to hand Tim a clean state plus a precise set of reversible decisions and remaining small binds — positioning the unstyled Review surface as the concrete thing to point Claude Design at next.
novelty: The framing of an intentionally unstyled, real-backend-wired in-app surface as the deliverable — structure as the design target — and the explicit retirement of a reinventing standalone mockup in favor of it.
contribution: Contributes the dated convergence record: the exact merge commits and green-gate figures, the inventory and roles of the Claude Design prep docs, the existence and shape of the in-app Review/studio surface (regions, backend wiring, unstyled token-slots), and the precise list of operator decisions and net-new binds remaining.
summary_for_embedding: A 2026-06-08 close-out narrative reporting the convergence of interface/studio, Claude Design prep and cognition streams into one all-green stable main, recording the three merge commits, the unstyled in-app Review surface wired to the real backend, and the items left for Tim to decide.
intention_for_embedding: To prove the merge-into-one-stable-main mandate was completed and verified, hand off a clean state, and point Claude Design at the deliberately unstyled in-app Review surface as the structure to design into next.
